case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 120-270s checkoutservice metrics. Latency.p90 dev=+1.7 confirms checkoutservice latency as root cause. Currencyservice Convert latency dev=+1.5 is propagation effect. Ranking maintains checkoutservice_latency
